records.name: Co-op Extraction
records.description: Primary cooperative mode where players enter, loot, and escape a collapsing dream zone.
records.summary: Two to four players collect memory shards and decide when to extract before the collapse timer expires.

records.name: Extract, Escape, Upgrade
records.description: Core loop for entering dream zones, collecting resources, escaping, and investing upgrades.

steps.name: Enter
steps.description: Players select a dream zone and load into an unstable run.

steps.name: Collect
steps.description: Players locate memory shards while choosing how much risk to take.

steps.name: Escape
steps.description: Players reach an extraction portal before the zone collapse finishes.

records.name: Vertical Slice 01
records.description: First playable prototype scope for proving the extraction loop in Unreal.
records.goal: Prove that shard collection, timed collapse pressure, and extraction decisions are compelling in one greybox Unreal map.
successCriteria: Players can complete one extraction session without designer intervention.
The Unreal development target can produce a local development build.
